label: Game announcement / reveal
note: Short by design -- announcements have limited confirmed facts. Do NOT pad with speculation or wishlists.
opening_rule: First sentence: your immediate reaction to this announcement -- excitement, skepticism, or indifference -- with one concrete reason.
closing_rule: Final paragraph: honest assessment of the announcement itself, not the hypothetical game. What does this reveal about the studio's direction?

sections.name: What was announced
sections.purpose: Confirmed facts only: title, developer, publisher, platform, release window if stated. No speculation dressed as fact.

sections.name: What we know so far
sections.purpose: Gameplay details, setting, features -- only from official sources or confirmed leaks. If a detail is unconfirmed, say so explicitly.

sections.name: Context
sections.purpose: Where this fits: franchise history, studio track record, market positioning. Name comparable titles and whether the track record inspires confidence.

sections.name: Known unknowns
sections.purpose: Key facts not yet confirmed: price, exact date, gameplay footage, engine, multiplayer. State them as open questions -- no speculation about what they might be.

sections.name: Our take
sections.purpose: Brief honest opinion on the announcement itself -- not the game we haven't played. Is this worth following? Why? One clear position, no hedging.
